sys_script_client.description:
Confirms and prompts the user to provide a reason to reject approval, triggered by reject ui-action 2.8.1 | 2022-10-17 |raj | STRY0127550 - Tech Debt - Task Types are used in code with hard coded values, modify to use a new value field in the table
2.8.0 | 2022-08-11 |raj | DFCT0011152 - Reviewer comments does NOT display when user "Approve and Sign" or "Concur and sign" a task/template task 2.8 | 2022-06-27 | raj | STRY0123191 - Warning Modal- Rejecting an Approval Subtask will close all "Approval Dependent Tasks"
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - Title - Rejection for Approval without Signature Tasker - Title - Rejection for Approval with Signature
sys_script_client.name: Task - onSubmit Reject
